testsuite.name: com.rousecontext.tunnel.CertRenewalTest

testcase.name: Firebase renewal succeeds with expired cert[jvm]
mTLS renewal succeeds with valid cert[jvm]
expired cert returns CertExpired for mTLS path[jvm]

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
